attachments.fallback: How can I open an MBOX file without Thunderbird or any email client? - @mohdkaif002 (Mohd Kaif)
attachments.text: I ran into the same issue when someone shared an MBOX archive, but I didn’t have Thunderbird installed. Instead of setting up a full email client, I used <https://www.macsonik.com/mbox-viewer/|MacSonik MBOX Viewer>. It allowed me to open and read the emails directly from the MBOX file. The tool shows email content, attachments, and folder structure without requiring any email account configuration. This utility is well equipped with fea…
attachments.title: How can I open an MBOX file without Thunderbird or any email client? [How-to Discussions]
